status: terminal failed preflight; superseded; never execute

terminal_findings.finding: The execution wrapper did not mechanically validate the frozen authorization schema, its bound hashes, or the exact variant argument tuple before starting a proxy.
The recorded between-variant command trusted selected booleans and numeric fields without closed-schema validation, observed-time derivation, USD arithmetic validation, or bound artifact hashes.
The campaign declaration bound by this revision ended at the V11 pair and did not intentionally declare the two fixed V13 paid-pair evaluator ledger paths.
The EUR gate did not freeze an official source URL, raw-response hash, latest-business-date rule, adverse buffer, or upward-cent rounding rule.
The protocol declared only the canonical undated judge response while the frozen transport could also accept the exact dated response; the accepted identity set was therefore not explicit and closed.
The revision had no fail-closed inventory that rejected undeclared files before seal or execution.
